2026-03-29: Day 30. The war widened on three new axes: Houthis fired their second missile at Israel in 24 hours, the IRGC struck aluminium smelters in the UAE and Bahrain for the first time, and the Pentagon began planning weeks of ground raids on Kharg Island and Iran's coast. Israel hit the Bandar Khamir port near the Strait of Hormuz (5 killed) and completed three waves of strikes across Tehran. An Iranian missile struck the ADAMA chemical plant near Beersheba, triggering a hazmat response. Four regional foreign ministers met in Islamabad to lay groundwork for direct US-Iran talks. Netanyahu ordered an expansion of the Lebanon buffer zone.
